hooks.command: echo 'PA boot-sync reminder: before any catch-up or user-facing work, run prompts/boot-sync.md — git pull, drain vault/cloud-actions.jsonl into Notion via MCP, re-sync Notion→cache if cache is stale (>15 min) or any actions were processed. If Notion MCP is unavailable, preserve the queue and tell Jeremy how many actions are pending.'

cd /Users/Jrosmarin/personal-assistant-agent && UNPUSHED=$(git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$UNPUSHED" ]; then N=$(echo "$UNPUSHED" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "⚠ $N unpushed commit(s) on local main — run: git push origin main"; echo "$UNPUSHED"; fi
